planets.name: Feel
planets.summary: Archive cluster around feel: 2577 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Feel receipt from 2024-03-09
artifacts.excerpt: I am terrified of my life becoming a tragedy of unfulfilled ambition and potential. The seriousness and paralysis this spawns turns it into a self-fulfilling prophecy. Naturally this understanding is not enough yet to let go of it
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: feel, good, now, something.

artifacts.title: Feel receipt from 2024-04-19
artifacts.excerpt:
Just had my happiest moment in 15 years ☺️ And it was such a gentle, easy happiness. No clinging, no aversion, no self-consciousness. Just presence

After 5 years (more or less) of dark night I feel incredibly blessed to be coming out the other side ❤️‍🔥
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: feel, good, now, something.

artifacts.title: Feel receipt from 2024-04-16
artifacts.excerpt: me and who? 🥺👉🏻👈🏻 https://t.co/TArywKh1Tx
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: feel, good, now, something.

artifacts.title: Feel receipt from 2023-08-03
artifacts.excerpt:
Just told my boss that I will quit ✨
Dobby is a free elf now 😄

It was nice, in the past I would agonize over that conversation so much but now it was just a 5 min check-in with myself. Also could sit with the anxiety and calm myself down. Really grateful how far I've come
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: feel, good, now, something.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2023-10-11
artifacts.excerpt: wait it's just dawning on me that when you get high you don't actually enter an alternate dimension. That shit is continous with all present moment experiences. It's all in the same reality!
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, think, want, know.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2023-01-24
artifacts.excerpt: I think I am resurfacing from the darkness. It's gonna take a while though. Don't wanna get decompression sickness
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, think, want, know.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2022-10-02
artifacts.excerpt:
Awareness alone is curative

You don't need to *do* anything to get rid of addictions. Just become aware of their full reality. What you are really doing. How unsatisfying it actually is. How it doesn't actually reduce suffering

This is isn't easy but it has helped me a ton!
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, think, want, know.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2022-11-25
artifacts.excerpt:
The fundamental mythological struggle I find myself in is whether a life guided purely by joy and aliveness, rather than self-coercion, is viable or just a pipe dream. 
Mind you I don't expect it to *consist* purely of joy and aliveness, merely that it is guided by them.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, think, want, know.

artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2024-05-06
artifacts.excerpt: @EthanReeder I think they mean titrate the emotion by partly dissociating with something that at least keeps your self-esteem up. Can be good advice but only if you actually do titrate and let the emotions process. Otherwise you're just prolonging them by productive dissociation

artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2023-08-18
artifacts.excerpt:
You know that thing that blacksmiths do when they put red hot metal into water to cool it off? I think if metal had an experience that would probably hurt a lot. More than being hot in the first place

Feels like the transition from hypomania to depression to room temperature
